id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0002
text:
![](https://assets.abnamro.com/api/public/content/datacenter-1921649117-landscape-4x1.jpg?t=h440)
Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself? [Podcast](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/podcast/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 16/10/2025 • 2 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Without US cloud services and chips from Taiwan, much of our digital life would grind to a halt. Yet Europe still relies heavily on technology from elsewhere. How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty.

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0003
text: Without US cloud services and chips from Taiwan, much of our digital life would grind to a halt. Yet Europe still relies heavily on technology from elsewhere. How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty. For decades, Europe trusted American technology.

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0004
text: Yet Europe still relies heavily on technology from elsewhere. How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty. For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0004

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0005
text: How did this happen, and what should Europe do to stand more firmly on its own feet digitally? In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty. For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe?

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0005
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0006
text: In this episode of the podcast Achter de Cijfers, journalist Esther van Rijswijk and sector banker Julia Krauwer explore the challenges and opportunities of digital sovereignty. For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0006
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0007
text:
For decades, Europe trusted American technology. But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B. Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0007

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0008
text:
But the re-election of Trump and his unpredictable policy exposed how vulnerable that dependency makes us. What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B. Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself.

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0009
text:
What if American tech companies stopped providing services to Europe? The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B. Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0009
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0010
text:
The spectre of governments, hospitals and financial transactions grinding to a halt adds urgency to developing a plan B. Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters. Whether it is cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence or chip technology, Europe should invest strategically and work together to build a stronger position.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0010
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0011
text:
Europe’s path to technological sovereignty
Having sufficient influence. According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters. Whether it is cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence or chip technology, Europe should invest strategically and work together to build a stronger position. Europe also has the chance to develop technology that fits its own values: transparent, fair and focused on the public interest.

metadata.chunk_id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0011
metadata.source_slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
metadata.source_title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?

id: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: According to Julia Krauwer, sector banker Technology, Media and Telecom, digital sovereignty does not mean Europe has to do everything itself. It means we must have influence where it matters. Whether it is cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence or chip technology, Europe should invest strategically and work together to build a stronger position. Europe also has the chance to develop technology that fits its own values: transparent, fair and focused on the public interest. Think of AI that does not discriminate, social media that are not purely geared towards addiction, and cloud solutions that safeguard privacy and security.
